name: Trakt
description: Track movies and TV shows using trakt.tv

cliPath.label: CLI Path
cliPath.help: Path or command name for the trakt-cli binary. Defaults to finding it on PATH.

clientId.label: Client ID
clientId.help: Trakt API client ID from https://trakt.tv/oauth/applications

clientSecret.label: Client Secret
clientSecret.help: Trakt API client secret from https://trakt.tv/oauth/applications
